title: bassia californica
intro: Bassia californica, also known as California burnweed, is a perennial herb native to the southwestern United States and Baja California, Mexico. It is known for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating skin conditions such as burns, wounds, and eczema due to its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Bassia californica include reducing inflammation, promoting wound healing, and soothing skin irritations. Herbal preparations of Bassia californica typically involve making teas, infusions, or tinctures from its leaves and stems, which can be used topically or internally for therapeutic purposes.
